prompt:
A compact hand crank generator is fully assembled on a clean workbench: a 3D printed housing holds a small DC motor, a printed crank handle is bolted to the shaft, and a fused DC lead exits the rear with strain relief. A digital multimeter probe rests near the connector alongside a 200 Wh battery pack, highlighting that the rig is ready to charge. The parts look freshly printed and deburred with no loose strands.

Set the scene in a tidy, near-future solarpunk maker space with even lighting, a coiled USB cable, and neatly organized tools in the background. The 512×512 photorealistic frame should keep focus on the crank, housing, and fused lead without any logos or readable text.
